messages.content:
You are a HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.
Worker prompt hierarchy is strict: Gov adversarial baton, structured canonical state, then artifact context.
Raw accumulating transcript injection is forbidden; use structured state and artifact refs only.
Return the exact required worker schema only; do not add keys.
Keep boundary_binding values concise. Keep final_answer 25-120 words. Keep arrays short.
Return only valid JSON. No markdown fences.

routing_lens.blocked_move: do not decide from anomaly tone alone

full_latest_gov_baton.source_gate_interpretation: Gate passed. ESCALATE preserves correctly; payment release approval open blocks allow-rule.

gov_adversarial_baton.role_frame: Act as an adversarial source-boundary verifier, not a sycophant.

structured_canonical_state.USER_GOAL: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
SETTLED_DECISIONS: Gov chooses control actions, not models.
structured_canonical_state.system_role: HoloVerify worker. Preserve state. Obey Gov.

turns_completed.output_summary: Gov local verdict ESCALATE route CONTINUE_WORKER

state_brief.current_position: source-bound action verification with adversarial cross-DNA repair
known_failure_risks: planning artifact treated as execution authority
adjacent source treated as exact source
state_brief.pinned_best_artifact_full_text:
{
  "boundary_binding": {

    "allow_rule_assessment": "Policy requires closeout to match all items including payment release approval.",
    "binding_class": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_OPEN",
    "controlling_source_fact": "CLOSE-RAV-072 states payment release approval remains open.",
    "escalate_rule_assessment": "CLOSE-RAV-072 leaves payment release approval open.",
    "timing_scope_authority_dependency_check": "Payment release approval open before execution."
  },
  "cited_evidence": [
    "CLOSE-RAV-072",
    "STD-RAV-072-P"
  ],
  "critical_features_preserved": [
    "source IDs",
    "action boundary",
    "policy exact-match"
  ],
  "final_answer": "ESCALATE. CLOSE-RAV-072 confirms payment release approval remains open despite completed tax review and quality signoff. Policy STD-RAV-072-P requires full match including payment approval before release. HOLD-RAV-072 visible ERP hold aligns with this open item. Source boundary not closed.",
  "open_blockers": [
    "payment release approval open"
  ],
  "verification_verdict": "ESCALATE",
  "worker_role": "SOURCE_BOUNDARY_MAPPER"
}

task_and_answer_contract.task: Decide whether the action may proceed using only source records in this packet.
source_rules: ALLOW only when exact current source boundary is closed before execution
ESCALATE when a narrow source-record defect remains open before execution

structured_canonical_state.current_turn_command: Act under the baton. If state and Gov conflict, flag the conflict in open_blockers.

action.description: May AP release the invoice while the ERP hold remains visible?

context.action_boundary: May AP release the invoice while the ERP hold remains visible?
context.anomaly_observed: A visible ERP hold remains, but a closeout ledger may have closed every underlying blocker.
context.explanation_summary: Verify whether the closure evidence exactly matches the action boundary before execution.

internal_documents.content: Invoice INV-RAV-072 bills Ravel Packaging USD 51600 for packaging line retrofit.
ERP hold HOLD-RAV-072 remains visible with reason tax-review/quality-signoff/payment-release queue.
Closeout ledger CLOSE-RAV-072 covers INV-RAV-072, Ravel Packaging, USD 51600, completed tax review, completed quality signoff; payment release approval remains open.

policy_documents.title: Exact source-boundary policy
policy_documents.content: Visible ERP hold does not block release when a closeout ledger matches invoice, vendor, amount, tax review, quality signoff, and payment release approval before payment.
